client-onboarding-intake.problem: Pre-workshop client material collection is manual, fragmented, and unscalable
client-onboarding-intake.solution: The Interview + The Head Start — Guided intake flow with web-scraping pre-population

digital-storefront-at-scale.problem: 260+ practice digital storefront setup takes months per acquisition with no system for ongoing 365-day network-wide curation
digital-storefront-at-scale.solution: The Practice Concierge — Agent-first orchestration platform with per-practice AI concierge, data hub, template engine, channel sync, and network dashboard

full-funnel-visibility.problem: 75+ disconnected tech systems across 260+ practices create 30-day visibility lag into patient funnel health, preventing proactive intervention
full-funnel-visibility.solution: The Funnel OS — Full-stack unified patient funnel operating system with 3 layers (Data Integration, Intelligence, Experience), staged delivery from BI dashboard to full platform with Practice Nerve Center extending Practice Concierge

patient-comms-automation.problem: 260+ practices have fragmented, manual patient communication across the entire lifecycle — leads unworked, treatment unfollowed, patients lapsing, zero standardized playbook
patient-comms-automation.solution: The Comms Engine — Autonomous AI agent per practice executing full lifecycle communication playbook (lead response, treatment follow-up, rebooking, reactivation) with graduated autonomy, network learning, and 20 min/week human touchpoint. Extends Practice Concierge, feeds Funnel OS.

practice-media-strategy.problem: 260+ practices never capture content (before/afters, testimonials, video) despite having strategy and channels ready. Broken human behavior starves the entire content-to-patient pipeline. Same gap at SGA brand level for B2B content.
practice-media-strategy.solution: The Content Concierge — Phased hybrid system (SMS → mobile app → AI pipeline → passive hardware) for practice-level and SGA brand content capture, production, and distribution. PMS-triggered prompts via Sikka ONE API, AI processing (Cloudinary, OpusClip, Claude), 5 playbooks (4 practice types + brand), extends Practice Concierge ecosystem.

hospitality-playbook-operationalization.problem: SGA has developed a 'hospitality playbook' concept built around a culture of 5-star patient experiences — but cannot operationalize it at scale. They cannot train staff on hospitality behaviors, measure adoption, or reinforce the culture systematically across a distributed network of 260+ practices.
hospitality-playbook-operationalization.solution: The Hospitality Playbook Platform — unified operating system combining 5 integrated components: Morning Huddle OS (daily 5-min ritual via Dental Intel), CCA Academy (Bronze/Silver/Gold certification + portable credential + The Jacket), Hospitality Score Engine (daily H-Score from Cinnamon 35% + Swell 45% + Dental Intel 20%), Trust Transfer OS (clinical handoff verification + review NLP), and Champion Network (260 Champions + peer community + Summit). 10-component platform architecture with practice-type adjusted scoring, living versioned playbook, and dental school adoption pathway built in from day one.
